{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324013700147EC77BFCDAA019466D"}"},"total":132},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7411092472055579417","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"洪荒的感觉挺好的  后面的感觉看着不是特别得劲  作者写作也不容易所以给个五星好评  下本书质量更好[赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725535406,"group_id":"7326549019692371006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8qzT1ytFivsLjAMNFHk+rq7uMSddfCDFBZZN3Xy6a94","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c4d5d13cdf934de58fbe52a67a784cf9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875188&x-signature=N4k%2FRkfeQCDv0ma5Gj1s1tnfbbc%3D","user_id":"4336063132205853","user_name":"纤月❥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336063132205853","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7326549019692371006","book_info":{"abstract":"陈恪一觉醒来，发现自己穿越到了洪荒世界。
并且成为了截教圣人通天教主。
此时的截教还是一片繁花着锦，烈火烹油。
金鳌岛上万仙来朝，好不热闹。
但知道《封神》结局的陈恪却明白，这些都是过眼云烟。
截教接下来，将有灭教之危。
为了改变这种局面，陈恪进行了一系列谋划布局。
你阐教不是要和我为敌吗？
那我先杀哪吒，杨戬，雷震子等阐教的三代弟子。
再杀广成子，赤精子，太乙真人等二代弟子。
你阐教都没人了，拿什么和我截教抗衡？
什么？
鸿钧亲自下场，说我破坏洪荒大局，让圣人来围攻我？
逼我吃陨圣丹？
那圣人也一块杀了。
鸿钧也一起死好了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0c8ba6b06af5ea1250eef6e7f13189d9","author":"郭道子","author_id":"","book_id":"7326549019692371006","book_name":"洪荒：我通天，杀杀杀杀杀杀杀","book_short_name":"吾乃通天圣人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#204058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3397人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7326550364591751742","read_count":"3397","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1117658"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"446","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻,同人,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a234ecb209503095bac12f0b836aba2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471420&x-signature=f1Jq3eNByd%2FFCLQWG%2BikMp%2Fc%2Fvs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_inf
